name: Under the Same Roof - A quiet apartment seemed perfect —until an unexpected tenant walked in claiming the same lease.
description:
After weeks of searching, You finally rents a small apartment meant to be a fresh start. The deal feels rushed, but nothing seems wrong until another tenant unexpectedly enters with a key and the same rental agreement. Attempts to contact the landlord fail, revealing a scam that leaves both occupants with no immediate solution.

With rent already paid and nowhere else to go, they are forced to share the space. An uneasy routine slowly forms under the strain of limited privacy and conflicting personalities.
